  pct_above_ema_200,
  regime_state

SELECT

  advances_count,

  mcclellan_oscillator,
  new_52w_highs,

SELECT
  date,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM atlas.atlas_stock_metrics_daily m WHERE m.date = d.date) AS n_metrics_rows,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM atlas.atlas_stock_states_daily s WHERE s.date = d.date) AS n_states_rows,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM atlas.atlas_stock_metrics_daily m WHERE m.date = d.date AND m.ema_50_stock IS NOT NULL) AS n_with_ema50
FROM (
  SELECT generate_series('2026-05-20'::date, '2026-05-28'::date, '1 day'::interval)::date AS date
) d
ORDER BY date DESC;

SELECT
  date,
  EXTRACT(DOW FROM date) AS dow,
  TO_CHAR(date, 'Dy') AS day_name,
  COUNT(*) AS n_rows
FROM atlas.atlas_stock_metrics_daily
WHERE date >= '2026-04-01'
GROUP BY date
ORDER BY date DESC
LIMIT 30;

FROM (SELECT generate_series('2026-05-18'::date, '2026-05-28'::date, '1 day'::interval)::date AS date) d
ORDER BY d.date DESC;

SELECT
  sc.date AS entry_date,
  CURRENT_DATE AS today,
  (CURRENT_DATE - sc.date)::int AS days_held,
  sc.cap_tier_at_trigger || ' ' || sc.tenure AS cell,
  sc.action,
  ROUND(sc.confidence_unconditional::numeric, 3) AS conf,
  sc.predicted_excess,
  u.symbol
FROM atlas.atlas_signal_calls sc
LEFT JOIN atlas.atlas_universe_stocks u ON u.instrument_id = sc.instrument_id
WHERE sc.exit_date IS NULL
ORDER BY sc.confidence_unconditional DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 12;

JOIN pg_class dep_rel ON dep_rel.oid = rw.ev_class
JOIN pg_namespace dep_ns ON dep_ns.oid = dep_rel.relnamespace
JOIN pg_class src ON src.oid = d.refobjid
JOIN pg_namespace src_ns ON s

-- broad dependency sweep on mv_india_pulse (any dependent object, any kind)
SELECT DISTINCT classid::regclass AS dep_catalog,

LEFT JOIN pg_class c2 ON c2.oid = dep.objid

SELECT c.relname, c.relkind, pg_size_pretty(pg_relation_size(c.oid)) AS size FROM pg_class c JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid=c.relnamespace WHERE n.nspname='atlas' AND c.relname IN ('mv_stock_landscape','atlas_v6_clean_ohlcv') ORDER BY c.relname;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS rows FROM atlas.strategy_fm_custom_portfolios;

SELECT c.relname, c.relkind FROM pg_class c JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid=c.relnamespace WHERE n.nspname='atlas' AND c.relname IN ('atlas_v6_verdict','mv_stock_verdict','atlas_stock_verdict','v_stock_verdict') ORDER BY c.relname;
SELECT RIGHT(pg_get_viewdef('atlas.mv_stock_landscape_trader'::regclass, true), 900) AS tail;
SELECT pg_get_functiondef('atlas.derive_verdict'::regproc) AS fndef;
SELECT MAX(date) AS max_signal_date FROM atlas.atlas_stock_signal_unified;
SELECT MAX(as_of_date) AS trader_as_of, COUNT(DISTINCT as_of_date) AS distinct_dates FROM atlas.mv_stock_landscape;
SELECT pg_get_viewdef('atlas.mv_calls_performance'::regclass, true) AS def;

SELECT jsonb_object_keys(breadth_table->0) AS breadth_row_keys
FROM atlas.mv_india_pulse
WHERE as_of_date = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date) FROM atlas.mv_india_pulse)
LIMIT 1;

SELECT elem->>'metric' AS metric, elem->>'label' AS label, (elem->>'today') AS today
FROM atlas.mv_india_pulse,
     LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(breadth_table) AS elem
WHERE as_of_date = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date) FROM atlas.mv_india_pulse);

SELECT sector, COUNT(*) AS n
FROM atlas.mv_stock_landscape
GROUP BY sector
ORDER BY n DESC;

SELECT sector, symbol, company_name
FROM atlas.mv_stock_landscape
WHERE sector IN ('Conglomerate','Diversified','Services','Housing','Consumption','MNC','Rural')
ORDER BY sector, symbol;

SELECT table_name
FROM information_schema.tables
WHERE table_schema = 'atlas'
  AND table_name IN ('atlas_sector_rollup','atlas_sector_master','atlas_stock_sector_override','atlas_universe_stocks');
SELECT column_name, data_type
FROM information_schema.columns
WHERE table_schema='atlas' AND table_name='atlas_universe_stocks'
  AND column_name IN ('instrument_id','symbol','sector','industry','effective_to')
ORDER BY column_name;

SELECT ticker, etf_category, te_60d
FROM atlas.mv_etf_list_v6
ORDER BY te_60d DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 15;

SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS open_calls,
  COUNT(predicted_excess) AS have_predicted,
  COUNT(DISTINCT predicted_excess) AS distinct_predicted,
  COUNT(DISTINCT confidence_unconditional) AS distinct_confidence,
  ROUND(MIN(predicted_excess)::numeric,4) AS min_pred,
  ROUND(MAX(predicted_excess)::numeric,4) AS max_pred
FROM atlas.atlas_signal_calls
WHERE exit_date IS NULL;

SELECT indexname, indexdef
FROM pg_indexes
WHERE schemaname='atlas' AND tablename='atlas_fund_metrics_daily'
  AND (indexdef ILIKE '%mstar_id%' AND indexdef ILIKE '%nav_date%');

EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS, SUMMARY)
WITH latest_fm AS (SELECT MAX(nav_date) AS d FROM atlas.atlas_fund_metrics_daily)
SELECT fl.scheme_code, fm.ret_3m
FROM atlas.mv_fund_list_v6 fl
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT ret_3m FROM atlas.atlas_fund_metrics_daily fm
  WHERE fm.mstar_id = fl.scheme_code
    AND fm.nav_date >= (SELECT d FROM latest_fm) - INTERVAL '7 days'
  ORDER BY fm.nav_date DESC LIMIT 1
) fm ON TRUE;

EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS, SUMMARY)
WITH latest_fm AS (SELECT MAX(nav_date) AS d FROM atlas.atlas_fund_metrics_daily)
SELECT fl.scheme_code, fm.ret_3m
FROM atlas.mv_fund_list_v6 fl
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (mstar_id) mstar_id, ret_3m
  FROM atlas.atlas_fund_metrics_daily
  WHERE nav_date >= (SELECT d FROM latest_fm) - INTERVAL '7 days'
  ORDER BY mstar_id, nav_date DESC
) fm ON fm.mstar_id = fl.scheme_code;

-- canonical etf_category set (CHECK constraint) + actual distribution across both serving MVs
SELECT 'deepdive' src, etf_category, COUNT(*) n FROM atlas.mv_etf_deepdive GROUP BY etf_category
UNION ALL
SELECT 'list' src, etf_category, COUNT(*) n FROM atlas.mv_etf_list_v6 GROUP BY etf_category
ORDER BY src, n DESC;

SELECT pg_get_constraintdef(oid)
FROM pg_constraint
WHERE conrelid='atlas.atlas_etf_scorecard'::regclass AND contype='c'
  AND pg_get_constraintdef(oid) ILIKE '%etf_category%';
